title: Enhanced & Optimized
description: Optimized and enchanced vanilla friendly version of minecraft
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e03b5682e51aa0aa9e76ab4722250a84de518434.png)

## ⚠️This modpack may be recieving only huge updates due my activity on ultra fast, a similar modpack that improves performance and doesn't enhhance as e&o
## [https://modrinth.com/modpack/ultra-fast](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ultra-fast)

### A vanilla modpack made to improve performance and visuals
to make minecraft more enjoyable to play and adds more resource pack features, like fresh animations.
Just **like OptiFine but better** and more modern
**Nvidia** mesh compatible **GPUs** have an **FPS boost** due Nvidium

This modpack has the best optimization mods I could find, much more optimization than FO or any Optimization modpack.

This Vanilla modpack (When fully release and all the mods where updated to the version) Offers the maximum performance experience with some enhanced stuff

**You must configure the controls, there are some repeated keys by deafult**

Play at 400 fps at 32 render distance with a mid gpu!

![comp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56543249d1dbac7dd9f6c186aa4d0acf2c4f96f2.png)
